headline: This Overlooked AI Infrastructure Stock Could Be 2026's Biggest Winner
summary: A name not exactly known for being an artificial intelligence player is making major inroads by offering simple-but-comprehensive platform solutions.

headline: After a Nearly 200% Run Since February, GF Securities Downgraded Dell Shares. Don’t Count DELL Stock Out Just Yet.
summary: Dell Technologies shares pulled back after GF Securities downgraded the stock, even as the company reported record Q1 fiscal 2027 revenue, driven by explosive AI server growth.

headline: Dell (DELL) Wins Shareholder Backing To Move Its Legal Home To Texas
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) shareholders have approved relocating the company’s legal domicile from Delaware to Texas. The move shifts Dell’s corporate governance and legal dispute framework from Delaware courts to Texas courts. The change aligns the legal home of Dell Technologies with its long standing headquarters in Texas. Dell Technologies, a major player in personal computers, servers, storage and related services, now has shareholder backing to align its legal base with its Texas...

headline: Qualcomm Showed Up Late to the Data Center Game, but Came Ready to Play
summary: Qualcomm aims to diversify beyond smartphones, targeting non-smartphone chips to be one-third of sales by 2029.

headline: Michael Dell Says Texas Is 'Home' And Where Dell Has Always Belonged, Elon Musk Chimes In
summary: Dell Technologies Inc CEO Michael Dell said Thursday the company will officially make Texas its legal home after shareholders overwhelmingly approved the move, drawing a one-word endorsement from Elon Musk. Shareholders Back Texas Move Michael Dell said 97% of shareholders...
